nodes.label: Mira Battle Idle - Player Character Sprite

properties.description: Flat vector illustration of a cute meerkat character in an idle battle stance. The meerkat is seated upright on a small patch of green grass, with one paw raised in a friendly wave gesture and the other resting on its belly. The character features a light tan/sandy body with a darker brown face, ears, and tail tip. The style is cartoonish and friendly with smooth gradients and rounded shapes, consistent with a casual or educational game aesthetic. Animation state is idle/resting pose.
properties.stance: seated upright, one paw raised waving
